meaning: n.箍,铁环,戒指,篮v.加箍于,环绕
examples: A boy came towards them, rolling an iron hoop.
Suddenly he saw the monkey Pipi playing with a hoop.
Lulu thought since the round hoop can roll, the watermelon can roll too, because it was also round.
Another contestant even managed to hula hoop down the catwalk while wearing his beard full of bees.
To many in the business, mashups are still a Hula Hoop, a game for kids.
